description_long: This emergency worker is dressed in a full-body pink jumpsuit with a hood, black gloves, and black boots. The suit features a black belt with attached pouches on both sides of the hips, and black patches on the upper arms. The face is completely covered by a black mask with a prominent white circle symbol in the center, giving a distinctive and anonymous appearance. The material of the suit appears to be a synthetic fabric, likely polyester or nylon, with a matte finish. The overall look is utilitarian and uniform, designed for anonymity and functionality in urban environments.
description: A figure in a pink hooded jumpsuit with black gloves, boots, and a circular-symbol mask, equipped with a utility belt and pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full pink suit, black gloves and boots, utility belt with pouches, and the circular-symbol mask.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, arm patch, and the protruding pouches on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, suit, belt, and pouches, with no visible mask details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm patch, belt, and pouches from the opposite profile.
attribute_uniform_type: A full-body pink synthetic jumpsuit with a front zipper, black utility belt, black gloves, black boots, and black arm patches. The suit is matte, form-fitting, and includes a hood for full head coverage.
attribute_helmet_or_headgear: A black full-face mask with a white circular symbol in the center, integrated with the pink hood.
